title: Pumpkin Bars
ingredients: ⅔ cup semisweet or dark chocolate chips
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F and grease an 11 × 17-inch pan.
Beat eggs, oil, and sugar until smooth.
In a separate bowl, add flour, salt, cinnamon, and baking soda and mix well.
Add dry ingredients to egg mixture and mix just until combined.
Pour batter into pan and bake 20–30 minutes, until set.
For frosting, beat cream cheese, butter, cream or evaporated milk, powdered sugar, and vanilla extract until smooth.
For drizzle, melt chocolate chips and butter together.
Drizzle melted chocolate over frosted bars.
notes: One of our favorite fall cookies!
